message:
feat(indexer,status): refresh lexical checkpoint after index run and add message counting

Indexer:
- Add count_total_messages_exact() for canonical message counting used
  in lexical rebuild checkpoint updates
- Add refresh_completed_lexical_rebuild_checkpoint() that updates a
  completed checkpoint's conversation count, message count, storage
  fingerprint, and committed offset to reflect the current database
  state after a full index run. This prevents the status/health
  endpoints from reporting stale fingerprint mismatches immediately
  after a successful index completes.
- Wire refresh into run_index() after the last_indexed_at timestamp
  update so every successful index run leaves an accurate checkpoint

lib.rs:
- Formatting: collapse multi-line .or_else().map() chains for
  structured_format across run_stats, run_diag, and run_health into
  single-expression .map() calls (rustfmt-consistent)
- Break long import/match tuple into multi-line form

ui/app.rs:
- Formatting and minor refactoring from concurrent agent work

tests/cli_robot.rs:
- Update assertions for refreshed checkpoint behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
